name: 7 Ate 9
short_description: Why was 6 afraid of 7? And why did 7 resort to cannibalism? Its your job as detective number 9 to find out what happened in this case of murder by numbers. 7 Ate 9 is a small horror adventure with a lot of secrets to uncover and multiple endings to find.
detailed_description:
7 Ate 9 is a hand crafted horror adventure where you take on the role of detective number nine and investigate the sudden influx of missing number cases. Its all about treading slowly and carefully, managing your resources, collecting evidence and avoiding getting eaten by that dreaded seventh number.

Achievments: Stay on the lookout, there's more to this game than meets the eye and with a multitude of achievements to collect you'll need to keep your eyes peeled and tread in places you might not think to look and even do the unthinkable in the name of finding secrets.

Arcade Mode: On top of the main game you can test your skills in arcade mode: specifically math skills as you'll be unlocking doors via addition to run away from 7 and build up a high score.
